revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
adding instruction from the corresponding [[WP:Editnotice|edit notice]], [[Template:Editnotice central redirected]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from remote talk page}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from remote talk page
  |name=From a remote talk page
  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace''' 
  |to=a corresponding [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#Centralized talk pages|centralized talk page]] that is more heavily watched, and thus more likely to be answered or acted on. Please start discussions there
  |all category=Redirects from remote talk pages
}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|1|
    {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}}}|yes|
      {{error|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} is a redirect, misplaced [[Template:R from remote talk page]]}}
    }}
  }}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from remote talk page}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from remote talk page
  |name=From a remote talk page
  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace''' 
  |to=a corresponding [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#Centralized talk pages|centralized talk page]] that is more heavily watched, and thus more likely to be answered or acted on. Please start discussions there
  |all category=Redirects from remote talk pages
}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|1|
    {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}}}|yes|
      {{error|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} is a redirect, misplaced [[Template:R from remote talk page]]}}
    }}
  }}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace''' 
  |to=a corresponding [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#Centralized talk pages|centralized talk page]] that is more heavily watched, and thus more likely to be answered or acted on. Please start discussions there

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from remote talk page}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from remote talk page
  |name=From a remote talk page
  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace''' 
  |to=a corresponding [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#Centralized talk pages|centralized talk page]] that is more heavily watched, and thus more likely to be answered or acted on. Please start discussions there
  |all category=Redirects from remote talk pages
}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|1|
    {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}}}|yes|
      {{error|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} is a redirect, misplaced [[Template:R from remote talk page]]}}
    }}
  }}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from remote talk page}}

  |name=From a remote talk page
  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace'''

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from remote talk page}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from remote talk page
  |name=From a remote talk page
  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace''' 
  |to=a corresponding [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#Centralized talk pages|centralized talk page]] that is more heavily watched, and thus more likely to be answered or acted on. Please start discussions there
  |all category=Redirects from remote talk pages
}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|1|
    {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}}}|yes|
      {{error|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} is a redirect, misplaced [[Template:R from remote talk page]]}}
    }}
  }}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from remote talk page}}

  |id=R from remote talk page
  |name=From a remote talk page
  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace''' 
  |to=a corresponding [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#Centralized talk pages|centralized talk page]] that is more heavily watched, and thus more likely to be answered or acted on. Please start discussions there
  |all category=Redirects from remote talk pages
}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|1|
    {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}}}|yes|
      {{error|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} is a redirect, misplaced [[Template:R from remote talk page]]}}
    }}

<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] 
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from remote talk page}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from remote talk page
  |name=From a remote talk page
  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace''' 
  |to=a corresponding [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#Centralized talk pages|centralized talk page]] that is more heavily watched, and thus more likely to be answered or acted on. Please start discussions there
  |all category=Redirects from remote talk pages
}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|1|
    {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}}}|yes|
      {{error|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} is a redirect, misplaced [[Template:R from remote talk page]]}}
    }}
  }}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] 
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from remote talk page}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from remote talk page
  |name=From a remote talk page
  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace''' 
  |to=a corresponding [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#Centralized talk pages|centralized talk page]] that is more heavily watched, and thus more likely to be answered or acted on. Please start discussions there
  |all category=Redirects from remote talk pages
}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|1|
    {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}}}|yes|
      {{error|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} is a redirect, misplaced [[Template:R from remote talk page]]}}
    }}
  }}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] 

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from remote talk page}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from remote talk page
  |name=From a remote talk page
  |from=a [[Help:Talk pages|talk page]] '''in ''any'' talk namespace''' 
  |to=a corresponding [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines#Centralized talk pages|centralized talk page]] that is more heavily watched, and thus more likely to be answered or acted on. Please start discussions there
  |all category=Redirects from remote talk pages
}}{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACENUMBER}}|1|
    {{#ifeq: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}}}|yes|
      {{error|{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}} is a redirect, misplaced [[Template:R from remote talk page]]}}
    }}
  }}<noinclude>

{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] 

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
